name: Buckshot
description: Buckshot is a Magic Sky-Faun Sensei in Skylanders: Imaginators. He trains Imaginators of the Bowslinger Battle Class.
biography: When Buckshot was young, he and his siblings were banished to the Magic Realm of Mysterious Mazes by an evil Spell Punk that wanted to rid Skylands of all Sky-Fauns. Buckshot spent years looking for a way out, but found no way to escape the enchanted labyrinth. Over time, however, the magic of the realm began to grow within him, strengthening his already formidable powers. While his siblings had lost all hope of freedom, Buckshot continued to test the boundaries of the maze, using his mystical bow and arrows to try to penetrate the walls around him. Eventually, Buckshot's powers became so potent that he even learned how to teleport. With this new ability, he was finally able to open a portal back into Skylands and free his siblings. Now as a Sensei of the Bowslinger class, Buckshot always keeps one eye on the target – and the other on the lookout for the Spell Punk that had banished him!
personality: Buckshot is cheerful and energetic, but apparently not exactly smart, as he failed classes and is unable to count his own Skylander stats.

content: Your Imaginators can train with me, Portal Master. Consider them good to goat!
And let's get the Secret Technique party started! I've got one for the Bowslinger Class that is bow-dacious!
Ha! They don't stand a goat of a chance! - before a battle
Mess with the goat, you get the horns...same thing with a bull. - after a battle
You've just cross the bow, baby!
Hahaha, got your goat, no wait, I'm a goat, and I got you!
Nice try, bad guys, but your skills aren't up to snuff!
What can I say, I like doing things well!
I like the sound of that, can't smell it though!
Power, thy name is goat! - Leveling up
Oh you know it, cool, disembodied voice! - Leveling up
I can't make heads or tails out of these numbers, of course I failed math. Heads or Tails class too... - checking stats
See, I'm more than just a flash in the pan.
Get outta my way, and into my car! - opening a gate
A new name?' 'You have goat to be kidding me!
Sky-chi for the win! - activating Sky-chi - You've Goat to be Kidding
Man, that was a lot of portals - after Sky-chi

trivia: His catchphrase is similar to Snap Shot's early catchphrase.
Despite having very dark brown skin ingame, in the figure and the artwork it's a light brown.
Both Buckshot and Splat are currently the only Skylanders that are fauns.
According to one of his quotes while viewing his stats, he claims that he failed math class.
Buckshot's quote, 'Get outta my way, and into my car!', is a reference to the song Get Outta My Dreams, Get Into My Car by Billy Ocean.
Buckshot's untraditional run cycle almost didn't make it into the final game because it caused too many complications.

trailers.name: Skylanders Imaginators - Buckshot Soul Gem Preview
Meet Buckshot l Skylanders Imaginators l Skylanders

gameplay: Buckshot can shoot his mystical arrows at enemies, and create magical Goat Portals. His Sky-Chi Power has him create so many portals around him and shoot his arrows into the portals at a fast pace.

basic.name: Spread Shot
basic.content: Press Attack 1 to shoot a lot of arrows at once!

basic.name: Goat Portals
basic.content: Press Attack 2 to create mystical Goat Portals. Shoot arrows in one portal to make them come out the other portal!

basic_upgrades.name: Through and Through
basic_upgrades.content: Arrows that go through portals do more damage.

basic_upgrades.name: Vortex Boomerang
basic_upgrades.content: Press Attack 3 to fire a magic boomerang that pulls enemies together.

basic_upgrades.name: Now You See Me
basic_upgrades.content: When you are creating portals, you move faster and stun most enemies that you touch.

basic_upgrades.name: Speedy Exit
basic_upgrades.content: After exiting a portal, you gain a burst of speed!

soulgems.name: More Bang for Your Buck
soulgems.content: Create a magical shockwave every time you make a portal, and have a lot more portals active at a time!

wow_pows.name: You've Goat to Be Kidding Me
wow_pows.content: The ultimate Sensei attack! Hold Special Attack to perform your Sky-Chi Power!

abilities.name: Not the Face!
abilities.content: You have a much higher chance of dealing critical hits to enemies that are very close to you.

abilities.name: Random Selection
abilities.content: Spread Shot now always includes a single, more powerful arrow that stuns enemies.

abilities.name: Where'd That Come From?
abilities.content: Portals sometimes shoot ram or sheep projectiles on their own.

abilities.name: Main Attraction
abilities.content: Goat Portals naturally pull enemies towards themselves.

abilities.name: Two for One
abilities.content: Shoot a Vortex Boomerang at a Goat Portal to destroy all Goat Portals in a huge explosion!
